other_notes: State representation now only includes the distance to the apple, the distance to each wall, and the first objects in all 8 directions from the snake's head and their distances. Training length is now in steps and batch size is 128 to control and lower training time. Rewards are now +0.9 for apples, -1 for death, and -0.001 each step. Maximum move limit has been removed to allow the agent to reach later game states.
